ddls:
CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the photo associated with the feedback */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team providing the feedback */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient of the feedback */,
  "giver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the feedback */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the feedback comment */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility setting for the feedback comment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numeric rating given by the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the feedback */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_visibility FOREIGN KEY ("visibility") REFERENCES visibility_options ("visibility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_giver_id FOREIGN KEY ("giver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the photo */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the photo was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the team belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the user belongs */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was hired */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_options" (
  "visibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visibility option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feedback related to the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., Commented, Responded) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
